docli 1.3.3
Copyright (C) 2026 The lovely team

  build      Builds the document.

  new        Create a new document.

  add        Add an element to the document.

  config     Shows 'docli' configuration.

  help       Display more information on a specific command.

  version    Display version information.

result.stdout:
docli 1.3.3
Copyright (C) 2026 The lovely team
USAGE:
Add Element Command.:
  docli.exe add --name WebServices --path .

  -t, --type    Required. Document element type (ex. Object, Application, ...).

  -p, --path    (Default: .) New element's Parent directory or one of its
                subdirectories. We should be able to find the parent directory
                by bubbling up the directory hierarchy.For instance if the
                `type` is set to `Application`, then any subdirectory of the
                Document folder would work.

  -n, --name    Required. Name of the application.

  --help        Display this help screen.

  --version     Display version information.

result.stdout:
docli 1.3.3
Copyright (C) 2026 The lovely team
USAGE:
Dry run.:
  docli.exe build
Upload changes to the database.:
  docli.exe build --upload

  -p, --path                  (Default: .) path to the document directory.

  -t, --type                  (Default: MultiFile) Input document type.

  --upload                    (Default: false) Upload the new version to the
                              database.

  -d, --detailed-exception    (Default: false) Show more details for exceptions.

  --help                      Display this help screen.

  --version                   Display version information.

docli 1.3.3
Copyright (C) 2026 The lovely team
USAGE:
Show configurations.:
  docli.exe config

  -s, --section    Target section of the configuration. Default is set to show
                   all.

  --help           Display this help screen.

  --version        Display version information.
